subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise, above all mention and utterance, befitteth the Object of all creation, Who through His consummate power hath revealed His words [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از ذکر و بیان مقصود امکان را لایق و سزاست که بقدرت کامله خود کلمات
subcodes.subjects: @false claims to divine revelation or spiritual stations, @wisdom [hikmat], @unity; oneness of humanity, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Moses, @Christ; Christianity, @Manifestation of God as sun
